title: Add  support for signed packed structs/unions

features.name: signed packed struct declaration
features.description: Code should include a packed struct declared with signed keyword that can be used as a signed primary in expressions
features.snippet: struct packed signed { logic [15:0] x; } signed_struct;

features.name: signed packed union declaration
features.description: Code should include a packed union declared with signed keyword that can be used as a signed primary in expressions
features.snippet: struct packed signed { logic [7:0] a; logic [7:0] b; } signed_u;
